category_sources: Official JerryScript homepage describes the project as a JavaScript engine for Internet of Things.
source_facts.description says JerryScript is an ultra-lightweight JavaScript engine for IoT.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jerryscript; official homepage and repository use the styled name JerryScript.
docs_sources: Official JerryScript homepage points users to documentation and GitHub.
Official repository README is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage positions JerryScript for Internet of Things and links to its GitHub project.
source_facts.description identifies a JavaScript engine for IoT.
